item.description:
# Shruti 1.1.8
Follow-Me now follows your clicks, even with a screen full of windows.
- Fixes the case where Follow-Me only switched focus after you minimized other windows. Shruti now listens for the app you actually click into and moves the focus there instantly, no matter how many windows are stacked on top of each other. - Under the hood: the focused app is tracked from the system's app-activation events instead of by guessing from the window stack, so an overlapping or always-on-top window can no longer steal the focus.
